info.name: CarePlus Full API

request.description:
Muc dich: Kiem tra suc khoe backend va cac dich vu phu tro nhu database, redis, elasticsearch.
Quyen truy cap: Public.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve trang thai healthy/unhealthy cua he thong.
Luu y: Route nay nam truc tiep trong app.js, khong thuoc module nghiep vu.

Muc dich: Kiem tra API root cua CarePlus.
Quyen truy cap: Public.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve thong diep chao mung API v1.
Luu y: Route nay nam truc tiep trong app.js.

Muc dich: Dang ky tai khoan benh nhan moi va gui OTP xac minh email.
Quyen truy cap: Public.
Body chinh: name, email, password, phone.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve thong tin user va thong tin verification.
Luu y: Schema dang ky dung field name, khong dung fullName.

Muc dich: Xac minh email bang OTP sau khi dang ky.
Quyen truy cap: Public.
Body chinh: email, otp.
Ket qua thanh cong: Danh dau emailVerified va tra ve user.
Luu y: OTP can hop le tu email hoac log/test setup.

Muc dich: Gui lai OTP xac minh email.
Quyen truy cap: Public.
Body chinh: email.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve thong tin verification moi.
Luu y: Co rate limit resend OTP.

Muc dich: Dang nhap tai khoan patient va lay access token.
Quyen truy cap: Public.
Body chinh: email, password, rememberMe.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve accessToken va user.
Luu y: Script se luu accessToken, userId, role vao environment.

Muc dich: Dang nhap tai khoan admin.
Quyen truy cap: Public.
Body chinh: email, password, rememberMe.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve accessToken va user admin.
Luu y: Dung request nay truoc khi test API admin.

Muc dich: Dang nhap tai khoan doctor.
Quyen truy cap: Public.
Body chinh: email, password, rememberMe.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve accessToken va user doctor.
Luu y: Dung request nay truoc khi test API doctor.

Muc dich: Dang nhap tai khoan receptionist.
Quyen truy cap: Public.
Body chinh: email, password, rememberMe.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve accessToken va user receptionist.
Luu y: Dung request nay truoc khi test API le tan.

Muc dich: Lam moi access token bang refresh token trong cookie.
Quyen truy cap: Public, nhung can refresh token cookie hop le.
Body chinh: Body rong theo validator strict object.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve accessToken moi va user.
Luu y: Controller doc refresh token tu cookie refreshToken, khong doc tu body.

Muc dich: Dang xuat va thu hoi refresh token neu co.
Quyen truy cap: Public, neu co cookie refresh token thi se thu hoi.
Body chinh: Body rong theo validator strict object.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve message dang xuat thanh cong.
Luu y: Controller clear cookie refreshToken.

Muc dich: Yeu cau gui email dat lai mat khau.
Quyen truy cap: Public.
Body chinh: email.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve thong diep chung va thoi gian het han reset.
Luu y: Neu email khong ton tai van tra response thanh cong de tranh lo thong tin.

Muc dich: Dat lai mat khau bang token reset.
Quyen truy cap: Public.
Body chinh: email, token, newPassword, confirmPassword.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve message dat lai mat khau thanh cong.
Luu y: Token reset can hop le tu email hoac backend test setup.

Muc dich: Lay thong tin tai khoan dang dang nhap.
Quyen truy cap: Da dang nhap.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve user hien tai.
Luu y: Access token duoc doc tu Authorization Bearer header.

Muc dich: Cap nhat thong tin ca nhan cua user dang dang nhap.
Quyen truy cap: Da dang nhap.
Body chinh: name, phone, gender, dateOfBirth, address.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve message va user sau khi cap nhat.
Luu y: dateOfBirth phai theo dinh dang YYYY-MM-DD va khong duoc o tuong lai.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Nguyen Van A",
  "phone": "0912345678",
  "gender": "MALE",
  "dateOfBirth": "2003-09-15",
  "address": "123 Duong ABC, Quan 1, TP.HCM"
}

exec: return path.split('.').reduce((acc, part) => (acc == null ? undefined : acc[part]), source);

request.description:
Muc dich: Cap nhat anh dai dien cua user hien tai.
Quyen truy cap: Da dang nhap.
Body chinh: multipart/form-data voi field avatar.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve message va user sau khi cap nhat avatar.
Luu y: Field file phai ten la avatar; middleware avatar gioi han toi da 2MB va chi cho JPEG/PNG/WEBP.

exec: return path.split('.').reduce((acc, part) => (acc == null ? undefined : acc[part]), source);

request.description:
Muc dich: Doi mat khau cua user dang dang nhap.
Quyen truy cap: Da dang nhap.
Body chinh: currentPassword, newPassword, confirmPassword.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve message doi mat khau thanh cong.
Luu y: newPassword phai khac currentPassword.

Muc dich: Lay danh sach user cho admin.
Quyen truy cap: Admin.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve mang user va meta phan trang.
Luu y: Validator xac thuc page, limit, role, status, createdFrom, createdTo.

Muc dich: Tao tai khoan nhan su moi.
Quyen truy cap: Admin.
Body chinh: name, email, phone, password, role, status va them doctor fields neu role=DOCTOR.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve message va user vua tao.
Luu y: Mau duoi day tao tai khoan RECEPTIONIST de body ngan gon.

exec: return path.split('.').reduce((acc, part) => (acc == null ? undefined : acc[part]), source);

request.description:
Muc dich: Lay chi tiet mot user theo id.
Quyen truy cap: Admin.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve user detail.
Luu y: Can co {{userId}} hop le tu request login hoac create truoc do.

Muc dich: Cap nhat thong tin co ban cua mot user.
Quyen truy cap: Admin.
Body chinh: name, phone, gender, dateOfBirth, address.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve message va user sau cap nhat.
Luu y: Body dung cung rule voi update me.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Nguyen Van B",
  "phone": "0987654321",
  "gender": "OTHER",
  "dateOfBirth": "2000-01-20",
  "address": "456 Duong XYZ, Ha Noi"
}

exec: return path.split('.').reduce((acc, part) => (acc == null ? undefined : acc[part]), source);

request.description:
Muc dich: Khoa hoac mo khoa tai khoan user.
Quyen truy cap: Admin.
Body chinh: status.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve message va user sau cap nhat trang thai.
Luu y: status chi nhan ACTIVE hoac LOCKED.

exec: return path.split('.').reduce((acc, part) => (acc == null ? undefined : acc[part]), source);

request.description:
Muc dich: Reset so lan vang mat cua user.
Quyen truy cap: Admin.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve user sau khi reset no-show count.
Luu y: Khong duoc tu reset no-show cho chinh minh.

exec: return path.split('.').reduce((acc, part) => (acc == null ? undefined : acc[part]), source);

request.description:
Muc dich: Admin reset mat khau tam thoi va gui thong bao qua email.
Quyen truy cap: Admin.
Body chinh: Body rong theo validator strict object.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve message reset mat khau thanh cong.
Luu y: Can user co email hop le de nhan mat khau moi.

Muc dich: Lay danh sach ho so nguoi than cua benh nhan dang dang nhap.
Quyen truy cap: Patient.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve mang profile va meta phan trang.
Luu y: Service hien tai co ho tro query search trong khi validator chi rang buoc page va limit.

Muc dich: Tao ho so nguoi than moi.
Quyen truy cap: Patient.
Body chinh: fullName, phone, email, gender, dateOfBirth, address, relationship.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve message va profile vua tao.
Luu y: dateOfBirth phai theo YYYY-MM-DD va khong duoc o tuong lai.

body.raw:
{
  "fullName": "Nguyen Thi B",
  "phone": "0912345678",
  "email": "relative@example.com",
  "gender": "FEMALE",
  "dateOfBirth": "1990-05-20",
  "address": "789 Duong DEF, Da Nang",
  "relationship": "ME"
}

exec: return path.split('.').reduce((acc, part) => (acc == null ? undefined : acc[part]), source);

request.description:
Muc dich: Lay chi tiet ho so nguoi than theo id.
Quyen truy cap: Patient.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve chi tiet profile.
Luu y: User chi xem duoc profile thuoc ve minh.

Muc dich: Cap nhat ho so nguoi than.
Quyen truy cap: Patient.
Body chinh: Cho phep update tung field hop le.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve message va profile sau cap nhat.
Luu y: Co the gui email/address = null de xoa gia tri.

exec: return path.split('.').reduce((acc, part) => (acc == null ? undefined : acc[part]), source);

request.description:
Muc dich: Xoa mem ho so nguoi than bang isActive=false.
Quyen truy cap: Patient.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve message va profile sau khi xoa mem.
Luu y: Neu profile con lich hen active thi se bi chan voi code PROFILE_HAS_ACTIVE_APPOINTMENT.

Muc dich: Dat profile mac dinh neu route legacy nay con duoc giu.
Quyen truy cap: Patient.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve message va profile duoc dat mac dinh.
Luu y: Tai lieu he thong hien ghi route nay khong duoc frontend chinh su dung, nhung backend van mount route that.

exec: return path.split('.').reduce((acc, part) => (acc == null ? undefined : acc[part]), source);

request.description:
Muc dich: Lay thong tin cong khai cua phong kham.
Quyen truy cap: Public.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve clinic info.
Luu y: Dung cho public website va cac man hinh can thong tin phong kham.

Muc dich: Cap nhat thong tin phong kham.
Quyen truy cap: Admin.
Body chinh: name, address, hotline, email, workingHours, description.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve clinic info sau cap nhat.
Luu y: Co the update mot phan, khong can gui du tat ca field.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "CarePlus Clinic",
  "address": "123 Nguyen Hue, Quan 1, TP.HCM",
  "hotline": "0281234567",
  "email": "contact@careplus.vn",
  "workingHours": "08:00 - 17:00",
  "description": "Phong kham da khoa dat lich truc tuyen"
}

request.description:
Muc dich: Lay DTO gon cho UI dat lich.
Quyen truy cap: Public.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve booking rules cong khai.
Luu y: Tai lieu khuyen dung route nay thay vi system/public.

Muc dich: Lay public system setting alias cu.
Quyen truy cap: Public.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve DTO cong khai cho booking rules.
Luu y: Route nay da duoc danh dau deprecated trong code.

Muc dich: Lay thong ke cong khai cua he thong.
Quyen truy cap: Public.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve public stats.
Luu y: Route nay duoc mount that trong backend.

Muc dich: Lay full system setting cho admin.
Quyen truy cap: Admin.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve system settings day du.
Luu y: Can login admin.

Muc dich: Cap nhat cau hinh he thong.
Quyen truy cap: Admin.
Body chinh: maxBookingDaysAhead, slotDurationMinutes, cancelBeforeHours, maxNoShowBeforeLock, maxActiveAppointmentsPerUser, morningShiftStart, morningShiftEnd, afternoonShiftStart, afternoonShiftEnd.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve system setting sau cap nhat.
Luu y: Cac field gio phai theo dinh dang HH:mm.

Muc dich: Lay danh sach chuyen khoa cong khai.
Quyen truy cap: Public.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve specialties va meta phan trang.
Luu y: Query validator ho tro page, limit, search.

Muc dich: Lay danh sach chuyen khoa cho admin.
Quyen truy cap: Admin.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve specialties admin va meta.
Luu y: Can login admin.

Muc dich: Lay chi tiet mot chuyen khoa theo id.
Quyen truy cap: Public.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve specialty detail.
Luu y: id la path param bat buoc.

Muc dich: Tao chuyen khoa moi.
Quyen truy cap: Admin.
Body chinh: name, slug, description, icon, active.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve message va specialty vua tao.
Luu y: slug la optional, neu gui phai dung lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens.

exec: return path.split('.').reduce((acc, part) => (acc == null ? undefined : acc[part]), source);

request.description:
Muc dich: Cap nhat chuyen khoa.
Quyen truy cap: Admin.
Body chinh: Gui it nhat mot field hop le.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve message va specialty sau cap nhat.
Luu y: active la boolean.

exec: return path.split('.').reduce((acc, part) => (acc == null ? undefined : acc[part]), source);

request.description:
Muc dich: Xoa chuyen khoa.
Quyen truy cap: Admin.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve message va specialty sau khi xoa.
Luu y: Neu chuyen khoa dang duoc su dung se bi chan.

Muc dich: Lay danh sach bac si cong khai.
Quyen truy cap: Public.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve doctors va meta phan trang.
Luu y: Query validator ho tro specialtyId, active, search, sortBy, sortOrder.

Muc dich: Lay chi tiet bac si theo id.
Quyen truy cap: Public.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve doctor detail.
Luu y: Can {{doctorId}} hop le.

Muc dich: Lay ho so bac si cua tai khoan doctor dang dang nhap.
Quyen truy cap: Doctor.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve doctor profile cua chinh minh.
Luu y: Can login doctor.

Muc dich: Cap nhat ho so cua doctor dang dang nhap.
Quyen truy cap: Doctor.
Body chinh: name, phone, title, experience, description, position.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve doctor profile sau cap nhat.
Luu y: Can gui it nhat mot field.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "BS Nguyen Van C",
  "phone": "0912345678",
  "title": "BS.CKI",
  "experience": 12,
  "description": "Mo ta bac si",
  "position": "Bac si dieu tri"
}

request.description:
Muc dich: Lay KPI/dashboard cua doctor dang dang nhap.
Quyen truy cap: Doctor.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve dashboard data.
Luu y: Can login doctor.

Muc dich: Admin cap nhat gia kham cua bac si.
Quyen truy cap: Admin.
Body chinh: price.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve doctor sau cap nhat gia.
Luu y: price >= 0.

Muc dich: Admin cap nhat mot phan ho so bac si.
Quyen truy cap: Admin.
Body chinh: name, title, experience, description, position, active.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve doctor sau cap nhat.
Luu y: Can gui it nhat mot field.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "BS Tran Thi D",
  "title": "ThS.BS",
  "experience": 15,
  "description": "Cap nhat mo ta bac si",
  "position": "Truong khoa",
  "active": true
}

request.description:
Muc dich: Tao mot lich lam viec cho bac si.
Quyen truy cap: Admin.
Body chinh: doctorId, workingDate, workingShift.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve message va mang schedules vua tao.
Luu y: workingShift nhan MORNING, AFTERNOON, ALL_DAY.

exec: return path.split('.').reduce((acc, part) => (acc == null ? undefined : acc[part]), source);

request.description:
Muc dich: Tao lich lam viec hang loat theo khoang ngay va weekdays.
Quyen truy cap: Admin.
Body chinh: doctorId, fromDate, toDate, weekdays, workingShift.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve message va mang schedules vua tao.
Luu y: weekdays dung 0-6; workingShift co the la ALL_DAY.

exec: return path.split('.').reduce((acc, part) => (acc == null ? undefined : acc[part]), source);

request.description:
Muc dich: Lay danh sach lich lam viec theo bo loc.
Quyen truy cap: Admin, Receptionist, Doctor.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve du lieu lich va meta.
Luu y: Validator ho tro alias shift/workingShift.

Muc dich: Lay lich lam viec cong khai theo doctorId.
Quyen truy cap: Public.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve lich cua bac si.
Luu y: doctorId la path param bat buoc.

Muc dich: Lay danh sach khung gio cua bac si trong ngay.
Quyen truy cap: Public.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve danh sach timeslot.
Luu y: doctorId va date la bat buoc theo validator.

Muc dich: Tam khoa mot khung gio bang lockClientId.
Quyen truy cap: Public theo route hien tai.
Body chinh: lockClientId.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve ket qua lock slot.
Luu y: Dich vu dat lich se dung lock nay de giu slot tam thoi.

Muc dich: Mo khoa khung gio da lock.
Quyen truy cap: Public theo route hien tai.
Body chinh: lockClientId.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve ket qua unlock slot.
Luu y: Can dung cung lockClientId voi luc lock.

Muc dich: Benh nhan tu dat lich cho ban than hoac nguoi than.
Quyen truy cap: Patient.
Body chinh: timeSlotId, doctorId/date/workingShift/startTime/endTime tuy chon, forSelf, patientProfileId neu forSelf=false, reason, lockClientId.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve appointment vua tao.
Luu y: Neu dat cho nguoi than thi bat buoc co patientProfileId.

exec: return path.split('.').reduce((acc, part) => (acc == null ? undefined : acc[part]), source);

request.description:
Muc dich: Lay lich hen cua patient hien tai.
Quyen truy cap: Patient.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve appointments va meta.
Luu y: listMyAppointments hien validate page, limit, status.

Muc dich: Lay chi tiet lich hen cua patient hien tai.
Quyen truy cap: Patient.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve appointment detail.
Luu y: Chi xem duoc lich thuoc ve minh.

Muc dich: Benh nhan huy lich hen cua minh.
Quyen truy cap: Patient.
Body chinh: reason, note neu can.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve appointment sau huy hoac ket qua requiresApproval khi sat gio.
Luu y: Route nay khong co validator body rieng; service co the tra ve requiresApproval=true neu sat gio.

exec: return path.split('.').reduce((acc, part) => (acc == null ? undefined : acc[part]), source);

request.description:
Muc dich: Bac si xem lich hen cua chinh minh.
Quyen truy cap: Doctor.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve appointments va meta.
Luu y: Service doctor list co ho tro search/date/status/page/limit.

Muc dich: Bac si cap nhat trang thai lich hen cua chinh minh.
Quyen truy cap: Doctor.
Body chinh: status, reason, note.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve appointment sau cap nhat.
Luu y: Validator cho phep CHECKED_IN, COMPLETED, CANCELLED, NO_SHOW; service doctor chi cho hoan thanh trong flow hop le.

exec: return path.split('.').reduce((acc, part) => (acc == null ? undefined : acc[part]), source);

request.description:
Muc dich: Le tan hoac admin dat lich ho benh nhan.
Quyen truy cap: Receptionist, Admin.
Body chinh: Co the gui patientId hoac thong tin benh nhan moi; bat buoc timeSlotId va forSelf.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve appointment vua tao.
Luu y: Mau duoi day dat lich bang thong tin benh nhan moi, khong dung patientId.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Benh Nhan Le Tan",
  "phone": "0912111222",
  "email": "walkin@example.com",
  "gender": "MALE",
  "dateOfBirth": "1995-06-15",
  "address": "Can Tho",
  "timeSlotId": "{{timeSlotId}}",
  "doctorId": "{{doctorId}}",
  "date": "2026-07-10",
  "workingShift": "AFTERNOON",
  "startTime": "13:30",
  "endTime": "14:00",
  "forSelf": true,
  "reason": "Kham noi",
  "note": "Dat lich tai quay",
  "lockClientId": "pm-local-lock-2"
}

exec: return path.split('.').reduce((acc, part) => (acc == null ? undefined : acc[part]), source);

request.description:
Muc dich: Tra cuu benh nhan cho flow dat lich cua le tan/admin.
Quyen truy cap: Receptionist, Admin.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve danh sach patient khop search.
Luu y: Service doc query.search.

Muc dich: Lay thong ke admin cho module appointments.
Quyen truy cap: Admin.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve weeklyData va specialtyData.
Luu y: Route nay nam truc tiep trong appointment.routes.js.

Muc dich: Le tan/admin xem toan bo lich hen.
Quyen truy cap: Receptionist, Admin.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve appointments va meta phan trang.
Luu y: Service ho tro them filter specialtyId va search.

Muc dich: Lay chi tiet lich hen cho receptionist/admin.
Quyen truy cap: Receptionist, Admin.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve appointment detail.
Luu y: Can {{appointmentId}} hop le.

Muc dich: Le tan/admin cap nhat trang thai lich hen.
Quyen truy cap: Receptionist, Admin.
Body chinh: status, reason, note.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve appointment sau cap nhat.
Luu y: status chi nhan CHECKED_IN, COMPLETED, CANCELLED, NO_SHOW.

exec: return path.split('.').reduce((acc, part) => (acc == null ? undefined : acc[part]), source);

request.description:
Muc dich: Benh nhan gui danh gia cho lich hen da hoan thanh.
Quyen truy cap: Patient.
Body chinh: appointmentId, rating, comment.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve review vua tao.
Luu y: comment toi thieu 10 ky tu; rating 1-5.

exec: return path.split('.').reduce((acc, part) => (acc == null ? undefined : acc[part]), source);

request.description:
Muc dich: Lay danh sach review cua mot bac si.
Quyen truy cap: Public.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve reviews va meta.
Luu y: limit toi da 50 theo validator.

Muc dich: Kiem tra lich hen da duoc review chua.
Quyen truy cap: Da dang nhap.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve review cua appointment neu co.
Luu y: Route nay yeu cau authenticate.

Muc dich: Lay danh sach bai viet cong khai.
Quyen truy cap: Public.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve blog list va meta.
Luu y: Public list chi lay bai viet published.

Muc dich: Lay chi tiet bai viet cong khai theo slug.
Quyen truy cap: Public.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve blog detail.
Luu y: Request mau dung slug tinh de minh hoa; doi lai slug that neu can.

Muc dich: Lay danh sach bai viet cho admin.
Quyen truy cap: Admin.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve admin blog list va meta.
Luu y: status hop le: DRAFT, PUBLISHED, ARCHIVED.

Muc dich: Lay chi tiet bai viet theo id cho admin.
Quyen truy cap: Admin.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve admin blog detail.
Luu y: Can {{blogPostId}} hop le.

Muc dich: Tao bai viet moi.
Quyen truy cap: Admin.
Body chinh: title, slug, content, summary, thumbnail, status, tags.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve blog vua tao.
Luu y: tags hien la string trong validator, khong phai array.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Cach cham soc suc khoe tim mach",
  "slug": "cach-cham-soc-suc-khoe-tim-mach",
  "content": "Noi dung bai viet toi thieu 10 ky tu de hop le.",
  "summary": "Tom tat ngan gon bai viet",
  "thumbnail": "{{uploadFileUrl}}",
  "status": "DRAFT",
  "tags": "tim-mach,suc-khoe"
}

exec: return path.split('.').reduce((acc, part) => (acc == null ? undefined : acc[part]), source);

request.description:
Muc dich: Cap nhat bai viet.
Quyen truy cap: Admin.
Body chinh: Gui it nhat mot field hop le.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve blog sau cap nhat.
Luu y: slug neu gui phai dung lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens.

exec: return path.split('.').reduce((acc, part) => (acc == null ? undefined : acc[part]), source);

request.description:
Muc dich: Xoa bai viet theo id.
Quyen truy cap: Admin.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve message xoa thanh cong.
Luu y: Controller tra data.message, khong tra lai blog object.

Muc dich: Bac si tao yeu cau nghi/ngoai le lich lam viec.
Quyen truy cap: Doctor.
Body chinh: type, date, exceptionType, shift, reason.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve message va request vua tao.
Luu y: exceptionType chi nhan ALL_DAY hoac SHIFT trong validator hien tai.

request.description:

Quyen truy cap: Admin, Doctor, Receptionist.

Muc dich: Lay chi tiet mot yeu cau duyet.
Quyen truy cap: Admin, Doctor, Receptionist.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve request detail.
Luu y: Can {{approvalRequestId}} hop le.

Muc dich: Duyet yeu cau duyet.
Quyen truy cap: Admin, Receptionist.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve message va request sau khi duyet.
Luu y: Chi duyet duoc request dang PENDING.

request.description:
Muc dich: Upload anh len Cloudinary qua backend.
Quyen truy cap: Public theo route hien tai.
Body chinh: multipart/form-data voi field image; co the gui them type, userId, postId.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve url va public_id.
Luu y: Field file phai ten la image; gioi han mac dinh 5MB; mime cho phep JPEG/PNG/WEBP/GIF.

exec: return path.split('.').reduce((acc, part) => (acc == null ? undefined : acc[part]), source);

request.description:
Muc dich: Xoa anh tren Cloudinary theo public_id.
Quyen truy cap: Public theo route hien tai.
Body chinh: public_id.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve message xoa anh thanh cong.
Luu y: Route nay khong yeu cau authenticate trong code hien tai.

Muc dich: Tim kiem doctor, blog va specialty dong thoi.
Quyen truy cap: Public.
Body chinh: Khong co.
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve data.doctors, data.blogs, data.specialties va meta tong hop.
Luu y: Controller validate query, page, limit bang Zod ngay trong controller.

Muc dich: Gui cau hoi toi tro ly AI cong khai cua CarePlus.
Quyen truy cap: Public.
Body chinh: message, history (optional).
Ket qua thanh cong: Tra ve reply DTO cua AI assistant.
Luu y: Co rate limit 10 request / 60 giay theo route.
